queries.query_sql: SELECT count(*) AS violation_count FROM (SELECT document_id, chunk_ordinal FROM public.ids_chunks GROUP BY document_id, chunk_ordinal HAVING count(*) > 1) AS violations;

SELECT count(*) AS violation_count FROM public.ids_metadata_sources WHERE source_id IS NULL OR btrim(source_id) = '' OR source_uri IS NULL OR btrim(source_uri) = '' OR source_boundary IS NULL OR btrim(source_boundary) = '' OR storage_class IS NULL OR btrim(storage_class) = '' OR source_size_bytes IS NULL OR source_size_bytes < 0 OR payload_size_bytes IS NULL OR payload_size_bytes < 0 OR payload_size_bytes > 1048576 OR is_raw_content_stored IS DISTINCT FROM false;

SELECT count(*) AS violation_count FROM public.ids_jobs WHERE job_id IS NULL OR btrim(job_id) = '' OR job_type IS NULL OR btrim(job_type) = '' OR job_state IS NULL OR btrim(job_state) = '' OR retry_count IS NULL OR retry_count < 0 OR max_retries IS NULL OR max_retries < 0 OR retry_count > max_retries OR connection_pool_size IS NULL OR connection_pool_size < 1 OR connection_pool_size > 10 OR payload_size_bytes IS NULL OR payload_size_bytes < 0 OR payload_size_bytes > 1048576;

SELECT count(*) AS violation_count FROM public.ids_documents WHERE document_id IS NULL OR btrim(document_id) = '' OR source_id IS NULL OR btrim(source_id) = '' OR source_uri IS NULL OR btrim(source_uri) = '' OR parser_state IS NULL OR btrim(parser_state) = '' OR payload_size_bytes IS NULL OR payload_size_bytes < 0 OR payload_size_bytes > 1048576;

SELECT count(*) AS violation_count FROM public.ids_chunks WHERE chunk_id IS NULL OR btrim(chunk_id) = '' OR document_id IS NULL OR btrim(document_id) = '' OR parser_state IS NULL OR btrim(parser_state) = '' OR chunk_ordinal IS NULL OR chunk_ordinal < 0 OR payload_size_bytes IS NULL OR payload_size_bytes < 0 OR payload_size_bytes > 1048576 OR NOT ((byte_start IS NULL AND byte_end IS NULL) OR (byte_start IS NOT NULL AND byte_end IS NOT NULL AND byte_start >= 0 AND byte_end >= byte_start));

SELECT count(*) AS violation_count FROM public.ids_evidence_records WHERE evidence_id IS NULL OR btrim(evidence_id) = '' OR evidence_kind IS NULL OR btrim(evidence_kind) = '' OR fact_level IS NULL OR btrim(fact_level) = '' OR source_ref IS NULL OR btrim(source_ref) = '' OR validation_state IS NULL OR btrim(validation_state) = '';

SELECT count(*) AS violation_count FROM public.ids_audit_events WHERE audit_id IS NULL OR btrim(audit_id) = '' OR actor_role IS NULL OR btrim(actor_role) = '' OR action_type IS NULL OR btrim(action_type) = '' OR object_ref IS NULL OR btrim(object_ref) = '' OR decision_state IS NULL OR btrim(decision_state) = '';

SELECT count(*) AS violation_count FROM public.ids_index_versions WHERE index_id IS NULL OR btrim(index_id) = '' OR index_version IS NULL OR btrim(index_version) = '' OR index_state IS NULL OR btrim(index_state) = '' OR coverage_ref IS NULL OR btrim(coverage_ref) = '' OR hot_index_pointer_ref IS NULL OR btrim(hot_index_pointer_ref) = '' OR payload_size_bytes IS NULL OR payload_size_bytes < 0 OR payload_size_bytes > 1048576;

SELECT count(*) AS violation_count FROM public.ids_schema_migrations WHERE migration_id IS NULL OR btrim(migration_id) = '' OR checksum_sha256 IS NULL OR btrim(checksum_sha256) = '' OR rollback_sql_ref IS NULL OR btrim(rollback_sql_ref) = '' OR recovery_checkpoint_ref IS NULL OR btrim(recovery_checkpoint_ref) = '' OR dry_run_required IS DISTINCT FROM true OR rollback_required IS DISTINCT FROM true;
